message:
feat(providers): add common aliases for provider discovery

Add human-friendly and alternate-name aliases to provider metadata so
that users can reference providers by common names they are likely to
type:

- deepinfra: add "deep-infra"
- mistral: add "mistralai"
- deepseek: add "deep-seek"
- togetherai: add "together", "together-ai"
- perplexity: add "pplx"
- xai: add "grok", "x-ai"
- huggingface: add "hf", "hugging-face"
- lmstudio: add "lm-studio"
- nvidia: add "nim", "nvidia-nim"
- siliconflow: add "silicon-flow"

Update the alias mapping snapshot test with all new entries so it serves
as a change-detection gate for future alias additions. Update the
canonical ID table JSON doc to reflect the current metadata.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -744,17 +744,31 @@ fn alias_mapping_snapshot_is_current() {
         ("bedrock", "amazon-bedrock"),
         ("copilot", "github-copilot"),
         ("dashscope", "alibaba"),
+        ("deep-infra", "deepinfra"),
+        ("deep-seek", "deepseek"),
         ("fireworks-ai", "fireworks"),
         ("gemini", "google"),
         ("github-copilot-enterprise", "github-copilot"),
         ("gitlab-duo", "gitlab"),
         ("google-vertex-anthropic", "google-vertex"),
+        ("grok", "xai"),
+        ("hf", "huggingface"),
+        ("hugging-face", "huggingface"),
         ("kimi", "moonshotai"),
+        ("lm-studio", "lmstudio"),
+        ("mistralai", "mistral"),
         ("moonshot", "moonshotai"),
+        ("nim", "nvidia"),
+        ("nvidia-nim", "nvidia"),
         ("open-router", "openrouter"),
+        ("pplx", "perplexity"),
         ("qwen", "alibaba"),
         ("sap", "sap-ai-core"),
+        ("silicon-flow", "siliconflow"),
+        ("together", "togetherai"),
+        ("together-ai", "togetherai"),
         ("vertexai", "google-vertex"),
+        ("x-ai", "xai"),
     ];
 
     let mut actual: Vec<(&str, &str)> = Vec::new();
